title: Luxury Oil Blotting Pressed Powder by Flori Roberts, Long Lasting Oil and Shine Control, Flawless Complexion for Women of Color or Deeper Skin Tones

features: SHINE MINIMIZING POWDER Flori Roberts’ luxury oil blotting pressed powder is infused with talcum powder to absorb excess oil, so you keep a shine-free, luminous complexion for hours. Long-lasting matte finish and flawless coverage for oily, combination, and mature skin.

ENHANCE YOUR TRUE BEAUTY Setting powder is designed specifically for richer skin tones. With 8 distinct shades, you’re certain to find the best match that flatters your one-of-a-kind skin tone. No matter your age, love your natural beauty and let it show.

FRESH FACE ALL DAY Pigment rich powder is so versatile. For lightweight, natural-looking coverage, apply it over your moisturizer in lieu of wearing foundation. To set your makeup, brush this pressed powder on for a soft finishing touch. It can also be used for oil blotting touch ups when needed.
BOOSTED WITH VITAMIN E Nourishing vitamin E is added to the premium ingredients for its ability to moisturize rough, dry, and damaged skin.

ABOUT US In 1965, Flori Roberts was the first cosmetics brand developed specifically for women of color. This was a big step towards giving African American women a prestigious line of diverse color cosmetics and skin care formulated and shade selected specifically for them. Collection offers a comprehensive range of quality color cosmetics that include foundations, face powders, blush, eye, and lip makeup.
